description: Sample-level clinical and genomic attributes from MSK-CHORD/cBioPortal

items.name: Sample Identifier
items.description: Unique sample identifier

items.name: Patient Identifier
items.description: Patient identifier linking sample to patient

items.name: Cancer Type
items.description: Main cancer type per Oncotree classification

items.name: Cancer Type Detailed
items.description: Cancer subtype per Oncotree classification

items.name: Oncotree Code
items.description: Assigned Oncotree code for the sample

items.name: Sample Type
items.description: Type of sample: Normal, Primary, Metastasis, Recurrence

items.name: Sample Class
items.description: Sample classification: tumor, cell line, xenograft

items.name: Primary Tumor Site
items.description: Organ sub-division of primary tumor location

items.name: Metastatic Site
items.description: Location of profiled metastatic site

items.name: Gene Panel
items.description: Gene panel or assay used for targeted NGS

items.name: Tumor Purity
items.description: Proportion of cancer cells in tumor sample

items.name: Sample Coverage
items.description: Sequencing coverage

items.name: MSI Type
items.description: Microsatellite Instability type: Stable, Instable, Indeterminate

items.name: MSI Score
items.description: Microsatellite Instability score

items.name: MSI Comment
items.description: MSI interpretation from pathology

items.name: TMB Score
items.description: Tumor Mutational Burden score

items.name: TMB Percentile (All Tumor Types)
items.description: TMB percentile across all tumor types

items.name: TMB Percentile (Within Tumor Type)
items.description: TMB percentile within same tumor type

items.name: Somatic Status
items.description: Indicates if matched normal was used for analysis

items.name: Archer Panel
items.description: Whether supplemental MSK-ARCHER test was performed

items.name: Sign-Out Comments
items.description: Sign-out comments from pathologist or fellow

items.name: Gleason Score (Sample Level, NLP)
items.description: Gleason score at time of sample collection

items.name: Sample PD-L1 Positive (NLP)
items.description: Indication if specimen was PD-L1 positive
